MINI MINUTES: PRESTON DONALDSON'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL AND REINSTATE ACTION (CODE CIV. PROC. 473(B))

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to set aside dismissal pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure, section 473, subdivision (b), is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF PRESTON DONALDSON.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's counsel Tara Harirchi and Bish Law, APC's Motion to be Relieved as Counsel to which no opposition has been received is GRANTED.

Movant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order using the mandatory Judicial Council form.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
